message:
test: add 26 extended proptest property tests for runtime_telemetry

Extended coverage for unified runtime telemetry schema:
- HealthTier from_ratio boundary thresholds (green/yellow/red/black ranges)
- HealthTier is_degraded, requires_attention, severity invariants
- HealthTier Ord transitivity and Hash consistency
- FailureClass suggested_tier always >= Yellow, Display non-empty
- TierTransitionRecord serde roundtrip and escalation/recovery XOR
- RuntimeTelemetryLog disabled mode discards events
- Single-event log keeps only last event
- Snapshot kind_counts and category_counts sum to buffered_events
- Snapshot emitted == evicted + buffered invariant
- Builder scope_id preservation and detail key preservation
- RuntimePhase, HealthTier, RuntimeTelemetryKind Display non-empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
